creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #3)

Not really, this would require me to create three accounts at the end:
* for work with my enterprise address
* for ASF-related stuff
* for my private stuff

Since 80% of my usage is business-related I created the account with my enterprise email address back then.

You can look up my ASF credits here: http://home.apache.org/phonebook.html?uid=michaelo

Is that acceptable?
